# Transcrição: 44. Trait 43 - Great Salespeople are good at starting things and they are unbelievable at finishing them.

- **Fonte:** 44. Trait 43 - Great Salespeople are good at starting things and they are unbelievable at finishing them.
- **Duração:** 01:15
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:15]

A great salespeople are good at starting things and they're unbelievable at finishing them. I know a lot of people that can start and a lot of people that can't finish. I know some people that can finish really good but just can't start enough. The greats do both. They start a lot of activities and they finish those activities. They're great, great at finishing. They're great at crossing the line. They're great at pressing a deal to a close. You get it? Not just making a customer, showing the product, presenting the product. You know thousands of people that do that. Show people, talk to people, market, promote and then don't finish. Don't close. Look, the willingness, the greats are willing to push through their emotions and the emotions of others. They're willing to push through all the noise and the conflict and the problems and the disagreeable customers. They're willing to push until they get the close because they know it's crossing a finish line. They know it's about finishing. Look, if I don't finish, if I don't close, if I don't get my product into the hands of the customer, I didn't help them and the greats know this. The greats don't open a phone call, they finish a phone call. They don't start relationships, they complete relationships. They don't start sales, they do and then they know how to finish them. Be great, learn to finish.
